Commands mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project. mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server. mkdocs build - Build the documentation site. mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit. Project layout mkdocs.yml # The configsuration file. docs/ index.md # The documentation homepage.ssssss ... # Other markdown pages, images and other files.
